ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the individual (e.g., Private, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., HS-grad, Bachelors) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Education number of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Never-married) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Exec-managerial, Tech-support) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual (e.g., Husband, Not-in-family) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the individual */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the addresses table */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the households table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclass ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_status ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., HS-grad, Bachelors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclass" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass (e.g., Private, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Never-married) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation (e.g., Exec-managerial, Tech-support) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship (e.g., Husband, Not-in-family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin (e.g., United-States) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_education" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_workclass" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_marital_status" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_occupation" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_relationship" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code or zip code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the countries table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the addresses table */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the household */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the household record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the household record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the individuals table */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_history" (
  "income_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the individuals table */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income amount */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the income record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
